name: Sanket Prakash Repale
title: SDET & Automation Engineer
summary: I build scalable test automation frameworks, design CI/CD quality gates, and deliver robust end-to-end testing strategies to help engineering teams release high-quality software with confidence.

bullets: Developed and optimized UI test automation frameworks using Python and Selenium.
Built and executed API automation test suites to verify backend integrations.
Designed and implemented API performance testing scripts using Locust.
Conducted ETL testing utilizing Agentic AI Automation frameworks, integrating AI workflows with traditional automation.
Initiated and scaled automated ETL validations using the Tosca Data Integrity (DI) module.
Actively involved in all stages of the Software Testing Life Cycle (STLC), ensuring high-quality test planning, design, execution, and reporting.
Developed and refined automated test scripts using Selenium, significantly enhancing the efficiency and reliability of web testing processes.

Applied advanced C# features and core Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles such as inheritance, polymorphism, encapsulation, and abstraction, creating robust, reusable test code and optimizing test case design.
Managed key project components, implementing the Page Object Model (POM) design pattern to improve code maintainability and simplify the build process.
Achieved a 75% reduction in testing time through the automation of test scripts, significantly improving testing speed and accuracy.
Specialized in web service testing with ReadyAPI and Postman, ensuring comprehensive testing of backend systems and API reliability.
Developed a scalable and adaptable API automation solution using ReadyAPI, tailored for different environments and integration needs.
Utilized Azure DevOps for bug tracking, project management, and continuous collaboration, improving team coordination and project progress tracking.
Contributed to the team's success by focusing on code quality, best practices, and conducting thorough peer code reviews, facilitating knowledge sharing and skill advancement.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to optimize testing processes, driving successful project completions through effective coordination and communication.
Delivered high-quality testing services to renowned clients, including Wolters Kluwer, adhering to strict quality standards and timelines.
Led the QA team's progress, ensuring the on-time production release and maintaining high standards for application quality.

certifications: AZ-900: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals (2024) – Foundational cloud concepts, Azure services, security, and compliance.
Selenium WebDriver Masterclass with C# (2022) – Automation framework development and UI testing using Selenium with C#.
REST API Web Service Automation Testing – Ready API & SoapUI (2022) – API automation, request validation, and performance testing.
Playwright Automation with JavaScript (2024) – Modern web application cross-browser automation using Playwright.
Azure DevOps for Automation Testers (2024) – CI/CD pipelines, automated test integration, and Azure DevOps workflows.
Generative AI for Everyone (2023) – AI-driven testing strategies and workflow automation in modern QA.
awards: Shooting Star Award – Bestowed for quick integration and delivering automation frameworks ahead of schedule at LTIMindtree.
Team Player Award – Honored for support in cross-functional teams and bridging engineering collaboration gaps.
Super Crew Award - Awarded for delivering high-quality automation solutions and optimizing testing frameworks.
Client Appreciation for Quality Work – Earned direct recognition from Wolters Kluwer for outstanding software quality.
